overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a female protagonist walking through a cyberpunk-style indoor market corridor with industrial metal walls and neon lighting. The character passes market stalls and sandbag barricades before stopping at a security terminal near a large reinforced door.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market alley with vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow market corridor, passing stalls on both sides

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind stall with arms crossed

entered.detail: industrial metal flooring with grid pattern covering the ground
wooden stall with containers of goods on the left side
wooden stall with crates and containers on the right side
large red neon digital display showing numbers hanging from ceiling
exposed pipes and cables running along the metal walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial market corridor with metal grate flooring. Vendor stalls line both sides displaying various goods in containers, while red neon signs hang overhead. A vendor stands behind the right stall as the character moves forward through the enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area with sandbag barricades and security checkpoint

events.description: exits the narrow market stalls into area with military sandbag barricades

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past sandbag piles toward the intersection with red signage

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking away toward the red star sign

entered.detail: stacked sandbags forming a defensive wall along the left side
large red star-shaped neon sign mounted on the far wall
massive industrial wall with X-shaped reinforcement beams

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from the market stalls to a security checkpoint area with sandbag barricades on the left. The character walks toward a large red star neon sign visible in the distance, passing the sandbags while a distant figure walks ahead. The industrial X-brace bulkhead wall becomes visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: security terminal station with heavy bulkhead door

events.description: character turns left toward the security terminal and bulkhead door
character stops in front of the terminal near the guard

agents.ego_description: turning left toward the security terminal, then approaching and stopping in front of the guard

notable_agents.action: muscular guard standing with arms crossed near the terminal

entered.detail: wall-mounted computer terminal with illuminated screen and interface

segments.scene_description: The character turns left to face a large X-brace bulkhead door and approaches a security terminal mounted on the left wall. A muscular guard stands with arms crossed near the terminal. The character stops in front of the guard, with the massive reinforced metal door dominating the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow industrial market corridor that gradually opens into a secure bulkhead checkpoint. It begins by tracking the character past vendor stalls and containers under red neon signs, moving across metal grate flooring in the enclosed space. As the market stalls recede, the scene shifts toward a security area where the camera passes sandbag barricades on the left and an X-brace bulkhead wall on the right, heading toward a distant red star neon sign. The camera then turns left to approach a security terminal mounted on the wall, passing a muscular guard standing watch. Finally, the movement comes to a halt in front of the guard, with a massive reinforced metal door dominating the background.
